task_completion.description: Both facilities are imported into CAMEO Data Manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main CAMEO Data Manager window shows both 'Greenfield Operations LLC' and 'Riverside Water Treatment Plant' in the facilities list.

task_completion.description: Margaret Callahan is added as a contact for Greenfield Operations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Contacts section for Greenfield, Margaret Callahan is visible with the type 'Fac. Emergency Coordinator' and phone '802-555-0418'.

task_completion.description: Greenfield's Methanol EHS status and Fire District are updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Greenfield facility details with Fire District 'Burlington Fire Station 1 - Downtown', and/or the chemical inventory for Methanol with the EHS box checked.

task_completion.description: Riverside's Hydrogen Peroxide amount and Sulfuric Acid storage are updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Riverside's Hydrogen Peroxide inventory with average daily amount 5200, and/or Sulfuric Acid's storage location set to 'Secondary Containment Building'.

task_completion.description: Riverside's contact phone and Fire District are updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Riverside's contact Maria Santos with phone 802-555-0347, and/or the facility details with Fire District 'Station 12 - Montpelier Central'.

task_completion.description: The corrected data is exported to the specified XML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file explorer, or CAMEO export confirmation showing 'regional_compliance_2025.xml' being saved to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO\'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the CAMEO Data Manager GUI to edit the fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through CAMEO Data Manager tabs and typing in fields, rather than using a text editor or script to modify the XML files directly.

integrity.description: The final XML file was exported using CAMEO Data Manager's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using the File -> Export menu in CAMEO Data Manager, rather than copying files or writing a script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires importing two XML files into CAMEO Data Manager and addressing 7 findings. Greenfield Operations LLC: Add contact Margaret Callahan (Fac. Emergency Coordinator, 802-555-0418); Methanol (CAS 67-56-1) EHS must be checked; Fire District set to 'Burlington Fire Station 1 - Downtown'. Riverside Water Treatment Plant: Hydrogen Peroxide (CAS 7722-84-1) average daily amount updated to 5200; Sulfuric Acid (CAS 7664-93-9) storage location changed to 'Secondary Containment Building'; Contact Maria Santos phone updated to 802-555-0347; Fire District set to 'Station 12 - Montpelier Central'. Final export must be saved to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO\regional_compliance_2025.xml.
